gherkin:
@req-008 @mcp @search
Feature: Case full-text search
  Scenario: SCN-001 Client searches cases by clinical terms
    Given the dataset is loaded
    When a client calls search_cases with query "chest pain"
    Then results contain cases whose FTS matches the query

@req-009 @mcp @lookup
Feature: Case retrieval by id
  Scenario: SCN-002 Client fetches a full case by id
    Given a case id from search_cases or semantic_search
    When a client calls get_case with that id
    Then the full MedicalCase including transcription is returned

@req-010 @mcp @semantic
Feature: Semantic similarity search
  Scenario: SCN-003 Client runs semantic_search for a clinical query
    Given nomic-embed-text:v1.5 is served by the pool
    When a client calls semantic_search with query "cardiac arrhythmia"
    Then results are ranked by cosine similarity above minSimilarity

@req-011 @mcp @specialty
Feature: Specialty listing
  Scenario: SCN-004 Client lists all specialties with counts
    Given the dataset is loaded
    When a client calls list_specialties
    Then exactly 13 medical_specialty labels are returned with row counts

@req-012 @mcp @stats
Feature: Dataset statistics
  Scenario: SCN-005 Client requests dataset stats
    Given the dataset is loaded
    When a client calls get_dataset_stats
    Then totals, bySpecialty, and bySplit are returned (cached 60s)

@req-007 @dataset @load
Feature: Two-pass idempotent load
  Scenario: SCN-006 Restart does not duplicate rows
    Given the dataset is already loaded
    When the loader starts again
    Then no rows are inserted (COUNT(*) guard)
